Bias Incident Support Services

301-405-0980 BiasSupport.umd.edu

Bias Incident Support Services (BISS) is a team within the Office of Diversity and Inclusion that is charged with addressing bias incidents targeting UMD students, faculty and staff. The program responds to incidents, collects and shares data on bias incidents, and educates the campus community about bias and its impact. If you have been affected by bias, you can submit a bias report to BISS or email BiasSupport@umd.edu to receive support.
